headline: How Microsoft Stock Rises 50% To $600
summary: Microsoft (MSFT) stock currently trades near $410 per share, with a market capitalization of $3.0 trillion and a trailing price-to-earnings (P/E) multiple of roughly 24.3. This valuation is notably conservative compared to its three-year average multiple of 33 and its historical decade peak of 48 achieved in late 2017. headline: The Path to $160: The Upside Case for Walmart
summary: Walmart (NYSE: WMT) is currently trading at a 49x trailing earnings multiple - well above its historical average of 31x. While industry peers like Target Corp (NYSE: TGT) trade at significantly lower multiples, this article presents the upside case for Walmart, arguing that its premium reflects a structural pivot from a high-volume grocer to a high-margin platform.
